headline: eBay (EBAY) Shareholders Rejected A Bid To Ease Special Meeting Rules
summary: eBay (NasdaqGS:EBAY) shareholders voted at the annual general meeting to reject a proposal to lower the ownership threshold required to call a special meeting. The decision keeps existing rules for convening special shareholder meetings in place. eBay runs a global online marketplace that connects buyers and sellers across a wide range of product categories, from consumer electronics to collectibles. The vote on special meeting rights comes as investors across the market continue to focus...
